englishDefinitions: A funeral pile; a combustible heap on which corpses are burned.
Any heap or pile of combustibles.
persianTranslation: انبوه تشییع جنازه؛ توده ای قابل احتراق که اجساد را روی آن می سوزانند.
هر توده یا انبوهی از مواد قابل احتراق.
examples: The villagers built a funeral pyre to honor their dead.
The effigy was set ablaze on the pyre.
For nine long nights, through all the dusky air, The pyres thick flaming shot a dismal glare.
Flames rose high from the pyre in the night sky.
